phase_sequence: 10 of 10 gated steps (Phase 8 of 9 in roadmap numbering — final phase)

predecessor_state.implementation_commits: 63da6ae..2c02878 (4 atomic commits) + 689af34 archive in CORE + 2c83682 ledger in ASSISTANT
predecessor_state.ac_09_alignment: Path A file-grain worst-severity aggregation: 262/262 (0% divergence vs header_missing_count baseline)
predecessor_state.test_state: 29/29 Phase 7 surface tests PASS across 6 test files; 177/178 broader pipeline+rag suite (1 pre-existing pipeline-snapshot baseline failure, not Phase-7-introduced); tsc --noEmit clean both configs
predecessor_state.indexing_result_contract: src/integration/rag/indexing-orchestrator.ts now exports IndexingResult with top-level status: 'success' | 'partial' | 'failed', chunksFailed[]/chunksSkipped[] entries each carry reason enum, refuses to run when validation-report.ok=false, --layer/--capability filters wired through to vector store metadata filter pass-through
predecessor_state.validation_result_contract: src/pipeline/output-validator.ts exports ValidationResult { ok: boolean, errors[], warnings[], report (11 numeric fields) }. Caller owns process.exit; validator is pure.
predecessor_state.boundary_enforcer_in_place: __tests__/pipeline/no-phase-8-docs-leak.test.ts shipped in Phase 7. Declares 8 forbidden field names (docsGenerated, schemaDocPath, schemaDocMd, apiContractMd, agentUsageContractMd, headerGrammarDocPath, documentationVersion, docsBuildTimestamp). Phase 8 keeps it green by doing work in markdown.

purpose: Make documentation match the code. Eight phases of pipeline rebuild produced canonical IDs, semantic header parsing, three layers of resolution, output validation, and indexing with semantic-facet metadata. Many docs were written against pre-rebuild or intermediate states. Phase 8's single job is to truth-up the doc surfaces against shipped behavior. No code changes. No new schema fields. No new tests beyond doc-presence checks. After Phase 8 archives, the 9-phase rebuild is complete and the Final Definition of Done is satisfied.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Scanner schema is documented in a single canonical location with current ElementData shape including layer, capability, constraints, headerStatus fields. Doc cites the source file (src/semantic/element-data.ts or wherever ElementData lives) so future drift is detectable.
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Doc-presence test: assert docs/SCHEMA.md (or chosen location) contains a section titled 'Scanner Schema' or 'ElementData Schema' that names all four facet fields. Code-side spot-check: every field declared on ElementData appears in the doc.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Relationship schema is documented covering the 4 raw fact types (RawImportFact, RawCallFact, RawExportFact, plus any header-derived fact type) AND the resolved-relationship surfaces produced by Phase 3 (imports) and Phase 4 (calls). Doc explicitly distinguishes raw facts from resolved relationships per roadmap line 466.
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Doc-presence test: assert docs/SCHEMA.md (or chosen location) contains both 'raw facts' and 'resolved relationships' sections; each lists the canonical type names that exist in src/.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Header grammar doc exists in docs/ as a canonical mirror of the BNF in SKILLS/ANALYSIS/analyze-coderef-semantics/SKILL.md (ASSISTANT repo). Doc explicitly states it is a mirror and points back to the authoritative source. Doc uses the same BNF productions, no divergence.
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Doc-presence test: assert docs/HEADER-GRAMMAR.md (or chosen filename) exists. Manual content audit: every BNF production in the ASSISTANT canonical source appears in the CORE mirror, in the same order, with the same tokens.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Graph schema is documented covering the 8-field edge schema (id, sourceId, targetId, relationship, resolutionStatus, evidence, sourceLocation, candidates), the 10-variant discriminated-union EdgeEvidence, and GraphNode shape including Phase 7's facet metadata propagation (layer/capability/constraints/headerStatus on metadata). Doc cites src/pipeline/graph-builder.ts as truth source.
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Doc-presence test: assert graph schema doc contains the 8 edge-field names + 10 evidence variants + the metadata.facets reference.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Resolution statuses are documented end-to-end: import-resolution statuses (resolved/unresolved/external/builtin/ambiguous), call-resolution kinds (5 CallResolutionKinds from Phase 4), with semantic distinctions made explicit per roadmap line 466 (resolved vs unresolved relationships, external dependencies, built-ins).
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Doc-presence test: assert resolution-status doc names every status enum value that exists in src/. Lossless audit: each enum value in source has matching doc paragraph.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Public API contract is documented: which exports from src/index.ts (or canonical entry) are stable and consumable by external callers, what the function signatures and return types are, what the version compatibility commitments are. Excludes internal-only utilities.
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Doc-presence test: assert docs/API.md (or chosen location) covers the canonical public exports. Audit: each public export named in the doc resolves to an actual export.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Agent usage contract is documented: what an LLM agent or downstream automation should read (e.g., validation-report.json, IndexingResult.status, exit codes) vs what is internal pipeline state not meant for agent consumption. Includes the gate contract (validation-report.ok=false → indexing refuses) and the IndexingResult.status semantics (success/partial/failed).
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Doc-presence test: assert agent-usage doc names validation-report.json, IndexingResult.status, exit code semantics from rag-index, and explicitly what NOT to read.

acceptance_criteria.statement: All 7 required distinctions from roadmap line 466 appear explicitly in at least one doc with concrete examples or clear definitions: (a) raw extracted facts, (b) resolved relationships, (c) unresolved relationships, (d) graph edges, (e) header-derived edges vs AST-derived edges, (f) external dependencies, (g) built-ins.
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Audit checklist: walk the 7 distinctions, for each find at least one doc paragraph that defines it. Track which doc covers which distinction in the analysis.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Stale claims are removed. Inventory is captured during prep (analysis.json stale_claim_inventory) and every entry is either rewritten to truth or removed. No doc retains a claim that contradicts current Phase 7 code state.
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Pre-Phase-8 prep produces stale_claim_inventory list. Phase 8 closeout verifies each item: status='rewritten' | 'removed' | 'reverified-still-true'. No item left at status='unaddressed'.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Boundary enforcer __tests__/pipeline/no-phase-8-docs-leak.test.ts remains GREEN. Phase 8 introduces zero new TypeScript field names from the forbidden 8 (docsGenerated, schemaDocPath, schemaDocMd, apiContractMd, agentUsageContractMd, headerGrammarDocPath, documentationVersion, docsBuildTimestamp) into Phase 7 source surfaces.
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Run the boundary enforcer test post-Phase-8-implementation. Must PASS. (Trivially green if Phase 8 work stays in docs/ and root *.md files.)

acceptance_criteria.statement: All 6 graph-ground-truth.test.ts assertions remain PASS. Phase 8 is doc-only over PipelineState, ExportedGraph, ValidationResult, IndexingResult — any code change is a hard halt and a stub-file event, not Phase 8 in-scope.
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: CI gate: graph-ground-truth.test.ts runs and passes 6/6 post-Phase-8.

acceptance_criteria.statement: CHANGELOG.md gains a Phase 8 entry summarizing the doc rebuild, plus a 'Pipeline rebuild complete' line citing the 9-phase span (Phase 0..7) with archived commit ranges or archive dir paths. README.md is updated if its top-level summary contradicts Phase 7 reality.
acceptance_criteria.test_strategy: Doc-presence test: assert CHANGELOG.md has a Phase 8 dated entry. README.md spot-check: top-level claims align with shipped code.

out_of_scope_hard_stops: NO source code changes. ZERO. If a doc is wrong because the code is wrong, file a stub — do NOT fix the code in Phase 8.
NO new test changes (no-phase-8-docs-leak.test.ts is Phase 7's gate; Phase 8 keeps it green by NOT adding any of the 8 forbidden field names to Phase 7 surfaces)
NO Phase 9 anything (there is no Phase 9 — Phase 8 is the final phase)
NO new schema fields, no new resolution statuses, no new evidence variants
NO ASSISTANT-side skill changes (skills can read the new docs, but skill authoring is its own track)
NO behavioral changes anywhere — Phase 8 is doc-only by definition

planning doc — likely stale vs shipped Phase 8 plan, candidate for archive

boundary_enforcer_disposition.phase_8_compliance: Trivially green by virtue of Phase 8 work happening entirely in docs/ + root *.md. No source code changes means no opportunity to introduce forbidden field names. The enforcer is shipped and stays — Phase 8 does NOT delete it (it is now the permanent post-rebuild boundary).

truth_sources.scanner_schema: src/semantic/element-data.ts (or wherever ElementData lives) + Phase 1 archive ARCHIVED.md
truth_sources.graph_node_shape: src/pipeline/graph-builder.ts buildNodes (Phase 7 metadata propagation) + Phase 7 archive ARCHIVED.md
truth_sources.validation_report_contract: src/pipeline/output-validator.ts + Phase 6 archive ARCHIVED.md (11 numeric fields, ok flag)
truth_sources.layer_enum_authoritative: C:/Users/willh/Desktop/CODEREF/ASSISTANT/STANDARDS/layers.json (per Refactor Rules line 488 — only source of truth for @layer enum)
truth_sources.chokepoint_invariant: src/cli/populate.ts validatePipelineState invocation (Phase 6 chokepoint INVARIANT 3/3 PASS)

style_guide_decisions_to_lock: One-source-per-topic: each schema/contract gets ONE canonical doc; other docs cross-link rather than duplicate. Decision needed: ARCHITECTURE.md as table-of-contents pointing into SCHEMA.md sections, or each topic gets its own file.
Mirror-and-cite: when CORE doc mirrors ASSISTANT-side authoritative content (BNF, layer enum), state explicitly that it is a mirror and link back. No silent duplication.

Audit-style root markdown disposition: EXECUTIVE-SUMMARY.md, AUDIT-REPORT.md, CODEREF-ANALYSIS-REPORT.md, DUPLICATE-FILES-AUDIT.md are point-in-time. Decision needed: archive to docs/archive/ vs delete vs leave-with-date-banner.
CHANGELOG.md format: keep current format or migrate to Keep-a-Changelog? Decision needed.
README.md as ToC vs README.md as standalone summary: pick one, do not mix.
phase_routing: All Phase 8 work routes through daily-agent-session-2026-05-04 (or later session if calendar advances). 5-2 stays as frozen audit trail per established routing rule. Phase 8 implementation will land on origin/main of CODEREF-CORE; ASSISTANT-side TRACKING ledger commit follows close.
